message:
fix(fcp-ratelimit): prevent deadlock and improve state accuracy

LeakyBucket::reset():
- Fix potential deadlock by acquiring locks in consistent order
- leak() acquires last_leak then level; reset() now matches
- Previously reset() acquired level then last_leak (inverted order)
- Under contention this could cause circular wait deadlock

SmoothPacer::state():
- Calculate reset_after based on actual elapsed time since last request
- Previously always returned min_interval when limited, ignoring
  time already waited
- Now returns accurate remaining wait time (min_interval - elapsed)
- Uses checked_sub to handle edge cases where elapsed > min_interval

Also removes a misleading comment about lock dropping that was
incorrect (both locks are held simultaneously during leak).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
